name: Orbyt
subtitle: Video app for Bluesky
description: Orbyt is a video-first social app for the Bluesky network, built on the AT Protocol. Available for EU and Japan via AltStore PAL.

apps.name: Orbyt
apps.subtitle: Video app for Bluesky
apps.localizedDescription:
Orbyt is a video-first social app for the Bluesky network.

• Browse video feeds from Bluesky
• Create and share short-form videos
• Connect with the AT Protocol community
• Built with React Native and Expo

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need camera access to record videos for posts and take profile photos.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: We need microphone access to record audio with your videos.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We need access to your photo library to select videos for posts and photos for your profile.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: We need permission to save your videos to the camera roll.
